name: Quantum Genesis AI Corp.
summary: . Company Overview Quantumzyme Corp., is a biotransformation company, focused on clean and green chemistry. Specifically, Quantumzyme is in the business of developing engineered enzymes in the application of active pharmaceutical ingredients (API) production.
